stemHtml: Consider an aircraft hydraulic system. The function of a non-return valve is to...

options.a: allow full flow of hydraulic fluid in one direction, and reduced flow in the other direction.
options.b: allow the flow of hydraulic fluid in one direction, but to prevent flow in the opposite direction.
options.c: prevent spillage of hydraulic fluid, in case of a leak in the hydraulic system.
options.d: shut off the flow of hydraulic fluid into the engine compartment, in case of an engine fire.
